metadata.name: fmdata
metadata.summary: python-fmdata is a wrapper around the FileMaker Data API.

classes.name: fmdata.inputs.DateFormats
documentation:
Enum for specifying the format of date and timestamp fields.

Attributes:
    US (int): US date format (default value).
    FILE_LOCALE (int): File locale's date format.
    ISO_8601 (int): ISO 8601 date format.

methods.name: fmdata.session_providers.ClarisCloudSessionProvider._get_cognito_token
documentation: Use Pycognito library to authenticate with Amazon Cognito and retrieve FMID token.

methods.name: fmdata.fmclient.FMClient.login
documentation:
Attempts to create a new session token using the configured login_provider.
Raises an exception if login fails.

methods.name: fmdata.fmclient.FMClient.safe_login_if_not
documentation:
Thread-safe login method that only logs in if no active session is present.
Raises LoginRetriedTooFastException if a login attempt was too recent.

methods.name: fmdata.fmclient.FMClient.logout
documentation: Explicitly logs out of the current session.
